quote.text: Technology is just a tool. In terms of getting the kids working together and motivating them, the teacher is the most important
quote.author: Bill Gates

links.title: Bootstrap 4 Beta
links.description: The new version of the most popular HTML, CSS, and JS framework in the world is finally out of alpha. Among the many new features, a broad support for flex boxes based design. Check out now the new beta.

links.title: SVG can do THAT?!
links.description: An incredibly detailed presentation by Sarah Drasner about SVG and its capabilities. You will probably be surprised at how many unexploited opportunities we have today on the web with SVG.

links.title: Linux Load Averages: Solving the Mystery
links.description: Linux load averages explained, including why they include the uninterruptible I/O sleep state.

links.title: What Is A Full Stack Web Developer, And Why Should I Become One?
links.description: What distinguishes a successful Full Stack Web Developer is not a superhuman ability to do everything, but rather, to understand everything…

links.title: Building A Simple AI Chatbot With Web Speech API And Node.js
links.description: In this tutorial, we will use the API to create an artificial intelligence (AI) voice chat interface in the browser. The app will listen to the user’s voice and reply with a synthetic voice.

links.title: How we built our first full-stack JavaScript web app in three weeks
links.description: A simple step-by-step guide to go from idea to deployed app

links.title: Do’s and Don’ts of Web Design
links.description: Web design is a tricky subject. There are a lot of things you should consider when creating a website. In order to simplify this task, this article offers a list of do’s and don’ts principles that every web designer should take into account.

book.title: Eloquent JavaScript: A Modern Introduction to Programming
book.author: Marijn Haverbeke
book.description: JavaScript lies at the heart of almost every modern web application, from social apps to the newest browser-based games. Though simple for beginners to pick up and play with, JavaScript is a flexible, complex language that you can use to build full-scale applications. Eloquent JavaScript, 2nd Edition dives deep into the JavaScript language to show you how to write beautiful, effective code.
